channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SCANPGEOM] SGL Resources Ltd Approves Unaudited Financial Results for Q3 2025
item.description:
SGL Resources Ltd, formerly known as Scanpoint Geomatics Limited, has approved the unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter ended on December 31, 2025. The approval was given at the board meeting held on March 3, 2026, at the company's registered office in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. The company's management and board of directors have prepared the financial statements in accordance with Indian Accounting Standard 34 and other accounting principles generally accepted in India.

  • SGL Resources Ltd has approved the unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 2025.
  • The approval was given at the board meeting held on March 3, 2026.
  • The financial statements are prepared in accordance with Indian Accounting Standard 34 and other accounting principles generally accepted in India.
  • The company's revenue and net loss for the quarter ended on December 31, 2025, are not material to the Group.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SCANPOINT GEOMATICS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [IOB] Central Government Nominates Mr Thomas Mathew as RBI Nominee Director on Indian Overseas Bank Board
item.description:
In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (c) of sub-section (3) of section 9 of the Banking Companies (Acquisition and Transfer of Undertakings) Act, 1970, the Central Government has nominated Mr. Thomas Mathew, Principal Chief General Manager (Retired), Reserve Bank of India as Director on the Board of Indian Overseas Bank. This change is in place of Ms. Sonali Sengupta with immediate effect and until further orders.

  • Central Government nominates Mr Thomas Mathew as RBI Nominee Director on Indian Overseas Bank Board
  • Mr Thomas Mathew to replace Ms Sonali Sengupta
  • Mr Thomas Mathew is a Principal Chief General Manager (Retired) from Reserve Bank of India
  • Change is effective immediately and until further orders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIAN OVERSEAS BANK | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SCANPGEOM] SGL Resources Ltd Approves Q3 FY2025 Unaudited Financial Results
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SGL Resources Ltd, formerly known as Scanpoint Geomatics Limited, announced its unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter ended on December 31, 2025. The company's revenue stands at Rs. 826.57 lakhs for the quarter, with a net profit of Rs. 60.75 lakhs. The Board of Directors approved these results in a meeting held on March 3, 2026. The company operates in a single segment and the figures for the previous period have been regrouped/rearranged as necessary.

  • SGL Resources Ltd announced its unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 FY2025.
  • The company's revenue for the quarter is Rs. 826.57 lakhs.
  • The net profit for the quarter is Rs. 60.75 lakhs.
  • The results were reviewed by the Audit Committee and approved by the Board of Directors.
  • The company operates in a single segment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SCANPOINT GEOMATICS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ZAPPFRESH] DSM Fresh Foods Ltd: Secretarial Auditor, Ms. Surbhi Bansal, Resigns Citing Pre-occupation
item.description:
DSM Fresh Foods Ltd. has announced the resignation of its Secretarial Auditor, Ms. Surbhi Bansal, due to pre-occupation with other assignments. The resignation is effective from March 03, 2026. Ms. Bansal has been a Practicing Company Secretary with Membership No. 36448. The company has provided the details required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 in Annexure A.

  • DSM Fresh Foods Ltd. announces the resignation of its Secretarial Auditor, Ms. Surbhi Bansal.
  • Ms. Bansal has resigned due to pre-occupation with other assignments.
  • The resignation is effective from March 03, 2026.
  • Ms. Bansal is a Practicing Company Secretary with Membership No. 36448.
  • The company has provided the details required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 in Annexure A.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DSM Fresh Foods Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SEPC] SEPC Ltd Cancels Letter of Intent from TCIL
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SEPC Ltd has informed the stock exchange about the cancellation of a Letter of Intent (LOI) from Telecommunications Consultants India Limited (TCIL). The LOI, which was received on February 7, 2026, has been cancelled as per a communication dated March 03, 2026 from TCIL. SEPC Ltd is taking appropriate steps in the matter and will keep the Stock Exchanges informed of any material developments in accordance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • SEPC Ltd cancels Letter of Intent from TCIL
  • LOI received on February 7, 2026
  • Cancellation communication received on March 03, 2026
  • SEPC Ltd taking appropriate steps in the matter
  • Company to keep Stock Exchanges informed of any material developments

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SEPC Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [PREMCAPM] Premium Capital Market & Investments Ltd Applies for Promoter Reclassification under SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Premium Capital Market & Investments Ltd has filed an application with BSE Limited for the reclassification of Promoter and Promoter Group from the category of 'Promoter /Promoter Group' to 'Public’ category. This move comes after the open offer made by Mr. Suman Nandi to the shareholders of Premium Capital Market and Investments Limited, pursuant to the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The reclassification request is in compliance with the conditions specified under Regulation 31A of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • Premium Capital Market & Investments Ltd files reclassification application with BSE Limited
  • Reclassification from 'Promoter /Promoter Group' to 'Public’ category
  • Open offer made by Mr. Suman Nandi to the shareholders of Premium Capital Market and Investments Limited
  • Compliance with Regulation 31A of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PREMIUM CAPITAL MARKET & INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Reclassification of Shareholding

item.title: [JSWINFRA] JSW Infrastructure's Fujairah Liquid Terminal Damaged by Drone Debris
item.description:
🔥 Trending

JSW Infrastructure's Fujairah Liquid Terminal suffered damage to one of its fifteen storage tanks when debris from an intercepted drone fell within the facility. The company immediately activated emergency response procedures and secured the remaining fourteen tanks. No injuries were reported, and adequate insurance coverage is in place. A thorough technical assessment is underway to evaluate the structural impact and determine the restoration plan.

  • JSW Infrastructure's Fujairah Liquid Terminal damaged by drone debris
  • One storage tank sustained damage, fourteen others secured
  • No injuries reported, all personnel safe
  • Adequate insurance coverage in place
  • Thorough technical assessment underway for restoration

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JSW Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SAGL] Spice Lounge Food Works Ltd Announces Black Coffee India Tour Presentation
item.description:
Spice Lounge Food Works Ltd, through its experiential and cultural events platform XORA World, is set to present internationally acclaimed DJ and Grammy Award-winning artist Black Coffee on 02 April 2026 at Quake Arena, Hyderabad. This event is part of the Company's broader XORA World pipeline, which includes a multi-genre event strategy and scalable large-format event capabilities. The Company aims to create repeatable, high-impact consumer engagement platforms, enhancing brand visibility, direct-to-consumer engagement channels, cross-brand synergies, and non-linear revenue streams.

  • Spice Lounge Food Works Ltd announces Black Coffee India Tour Presentation
  • Event to be held on 02 April 2026 at Quake Arena, Hyderabad
  • Part of the Company's broader XORA World pipeline
  • Multi-genre event strategy and scalable large-format event capabilities
  • Objective to create repeatable, high-impact consumer engagement platforms

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shalimar Agencies Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RSYSTEMINT] Over 40% of Mid-Market Enterprises Leapfrog AI Adoption to Accelerate Competitiveness, New Report Commissioned by R Systems Finds
item.description:
R Systems commissioned a report by Everest Group, titled 'Agentic AI 2026: A Mid-Market Playbook for Adoption and Scale'. The report found that over 40% of mid-market enterprises are bypassing traditional AI adoption stages to accelerate competitiveness. The report also provides a practical framework to help mid-market enterprises operationalize AI at scale, addressing integration complexity, legacy system constraints, and governance readiness gaps.

  • Over 40% of mid-market enterprises are bypassing traditional AI adoption stages
  • 57% of enterprises are in the 'pilot' stage of agentic AI
  • Only 15% of enterprises have reached the 'scaler' stage where they have operationalized agents across functions
  • 64% of enterprises express 'high' or 'very high' trust in agentic AI
  • Only 7% of enterprises have agentic-specific policies in place

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: R Systems International Limited | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PREMCAPM] Premium Capital Market & Investments Ltd: Promoter Reclassification to Public Category Following Open Offer
item.description:
Premium Capital Market & Investments Ltd has announced the reclassification of certain promoters and promoter group members to the public category. This reclassification follows the open offer made by Mr. Suman Nandi, who now controls the listed entity. The reclassified individuals no longer hold more than 10% of the total voting rights, do not exercise control over the company's affairs, and have no special rights or formal/informal arrangements. They will not serve on the board or act as key managerial personnel for three years. The company is compliant with minimum public shareholding requirements, has no trading suspensions, and has no outstanding dues to SEBI, stock exchanges, or depositories.

  • Reclassification of certain promoters and promoter group members to public category
  • Open offer by Mr. Suman Nandi leading to change in control
  • No holding of more than 10% voting rights, control, or special rights for the reclassified individuals
  • Three-year restriction from board membership and key managerial roles
  • Company compliance with minimum public shareholding, no trading suspensions, and no outstanding dues

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PREMIUM CAPITAL MARKET & INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Reclassification of Shareholding
